metrolink: When using the Metrolink network please ensure you have all your belongings with you at all times. Please check your seat before leaving the service. Unattended items may be removed without warning
headlines: US Army picks out Vampire to fill a gap in its layered drone defenses
AI is code – and can't be prompted into being smarter
EU sovereignty push gives tech buyers a new alphabet soup to swallow
Scientists pour cold water on claims phones are rewiring kids' brains
crew_quote: "Clear skies up there, but I’m sweating like a curry in a sauna down here at 21.3°C! Anyone fancy a pint while we wait for the AI to learn how to make one?"
